examples: Have strong bacteriostatic action to dermatophyte and mildew which can result in different kinds of skin affection.
Objective to understand the effect of products secreted by dermatophyte and candia albican on human keratinocyte in vitro.
Objective To compare the efficacy of terbinafine with itraconazole, fluconazole and griseofulvin in the treatment of dermatophyte onychomycosis.
